title: MyGift Set of 4 Glass Apothecary Jars Set, Clear Candy Jars with Lids
description:
About this item
Beautifully display both food and decorative items in these 4 glass jars
Small size makes them perfect for storage on tables, counter tops, and shelves
Each jar features a different size, shape, and a removable lid
Perfect as a weddings and holiday centerpieces or candy buffet display
SPECS: 4.4 L x 4.4 W x 9.1 H (in inches)
reviews_5s: I was leery of getting these but not disappointed. The lids are my only slight complaint as it does not say which one goes on which nor do they sit very well but they are placed where they will not be jarred around so it works. Not air tight which was why I was skeptical of getting them but liked the look so much decided to change my plans for them and they hold things like Q-tips, cotton balls, and hair bands instead of powders.Shapes are nice, a bit small for priceIt was really nice for our sweet table at my daughter’s birthday party. It’s was exactly what my daughter imagined.Using real glass for my daughter's birthday party was a little nerve racking, but it went smooth as possible. Thank God.. These glass candy jars was not to big, just a little small but, it still enhanced my table.Perfect for candy buffet / table. They are the small ones so make sure you read the size before ordering. The bad reviews about sizing is crazy when it clearly tells you the size. No glass was chipped or broken. I have washed before use and washed after and still in perfect condition.What amazing customer service !! Love the product. I had to fix something and they responded right away.The jars came extremely well packed. They look great, I just wish they were one inch taller.They were perfect for a candy buffet! They were very pretty and the perfect size.The dish was an excellent size for a candy table the presentation was amazingUsed for bathroom decor and looks great!
reviews_1s:
Bought this a week ago.. just getting ready to use it for a party set up. And the covers are crackTerrible!! I brought two sets. For the price it’s super tiny and the lids don’t fit the jars. UnsatisfiedThe items are very small and images provide are not fit to scale. Had to return this item.Too small for the purchase amount!
Not happy at all for the occasion that I had, over priced!!
